messages.string: The {field} field must be a string.
messages.email: The {field} must be a valid email address.
messages.minLength: The {field} must be at least {min} characters.
messages.date: The {field} must be a valid date.
messages.date.afterOrSameAs: The {field} must be a date after or on the same day as {otherField}.
messages.positive: The {field} must be a positive number.
messages.withoutDecimals: The {field} must be a whole number.
